relatedness_reasoning: While both files involve customer and account data, the inbound file documents hardship assistance requests (a forward-looking intervention), whereas the outbound file reports arrears flags (a backward-looking compliance alert). The inbound schema contains no arrears, payment history, or risk classification data needed to populate the outbound schema. The outbound file's core fields (arrears_status, arrears_days, last_payment_date, risk_category, compliance_action_required) have no corresponding sources in the inbound schema, suggesting these files represent separate business processes rather than a data lineage pipeline.
